content.en:
Ye Tian learned from the exploration of the copying talent that the young man in front of him was a desolate demon.

Desolate: Martial Arts

Cultivation talent: Yu level

Defense Talent: God-level

Speed Talent: God-level

Strength Talent: God

Marksmanship Talent: No superior

Golden Shield Talent: God-level

Wildline Talent: God-level

......

In terms of talent, martial arts are very good, but as for the combat power, it is impossible to judge from talent, after all, the cultivation of martial arts is already in the realm of cosmic gods.

The powerhouses at this level do not rely on talent, but on the degree of use of talent, supernatural powers, secret arts, and the use of the Great Dao, which are the criteria that really determine combat power.

But the desolate demons are very special, they can mobilize the power of the desolate realm, similar to the ability of the innate gods of the desolate realm.

Therefore, even if this desolate demon's cultivation is only the appearance of the third order of the Universe God, not the peak of the Universe God, its combat power is still terrifying.

"The Desolate Demon's Desolate Pattern talent should be a talent that can communicate the origin of the Desolate Realm and mobilize the power of the Desolate Realm, if I copy it, it should also be able to mobilize the power of the Desolate Realm!"

"Copy the Wildline Talent!"

Ye Tian instantly copied this talent.

In fact, the Wild Stripe talent is also very useful in the Wasteland, but once you leave the Wasteland, the Wildbread talent is useless.

Therefore, Ye Tian was actually not too interested in the talent of the barren pattern.

However, in order to increase his self-protection ability in the Wasteland, he naturally wanted to copy it.

Wu Zhan looked at Ye Tian, holding a silver spear, and said: "People of other races, although I bullied you with the realm of the cosmic god and some of the big and the small, but the ten thousand races and the other races in the wasteland are mortal enemies, so I must kill you." You shouldn't have come to the Wasteland, you brought it on yourself!"

After saying that, Wu Zhan made a move.

Rumble!!!

The power of the wasteland is blessed on the gun of martial arts, coupled with the fact that he has performed a supreme spear technique, as well as the power of the small universe, making this shot extremely terrifying!

It can be said that even if an ordinary cosmic god stands in front of Wu Zhan, he can kill the other party in one move.

In the face of martial arts, Ye Tian no longer hid his strength.

With the blessing of the power of the Desolate Realm, the cultivation of Wu Zhan cannot be measured according to the third order of the Universe God, and it is definitely comparable to the cultivation of the seventh and eighth orders of the Universe God.

In addition, the combat power of the martial arts itself is not weak, so the superimposed combat power is terrifying.

If Ye Tian underestimated the martial arts, he would definitely fall into disadvantage.

Therefore, he simply stopped hiding his strength.

"Mixed Element Scale Armor!"

"God-level defense talent!"

......

Ye Tian used all kinds of defensive means first to ensure that his defense was at an extremely high level.

Then, Ye Tian used his best to use the Heavenly Moon Knife Technique.

"Slash!"

Ye Tian greeted the shot of the martial arts with a sword.

Boom!

The void exploded, and the shockwave swept all around, causing the mountain range to explode into nothingness in an instant.

"Impossible!"

Under the powerful impact, Wu Zhan's body flew out upside down, but it was still relying on the power of the wasteland to stabilize his body.

Flesh wound!

"I was wounded by a galaxy-level?"

Wu Zhan was stunned.

He is a desolate demon, and he is also a desolate demon at the level of a cosmic god, able to mobilize the power of the desolate realm, but now he has been injured by a galaxy-level, what kind of concept is this?

"How could such a demonic genius be born in the universe, this is not logical, it simply breaks the limit of the rules of the universe!" Wu Zhan thought incredulously.

"I'm going to kill you!"

Wu Zhan yelled.

He mobilized all his strength, did his best to mobilize the power of the Desolate Realm, and launched an attack on Ye Tian again.

Then.

Ye Tian used the power of the Five Elements Divine Wheel and time and space to suppress this void, and then cast the Great Divine Power of the Hell Divine Void Spear.

Although Wu Zhan blocked the Spear of the Hell Divine Sky, he was still injured by the Spear of the Hell Divine Sky.

"Black Lotus Realm!"

The Chaos True Rank Black Lotus Realm was unleashed by Ye Tian, and it instantly enveloped the martial arts.

At this moment, Wu Zhan felt the threat to his life, and hurriedly urged various defensive secret techniques, coupled with the blessing of the power of the wasteland.

Rumble!!!!

The Black Lotus Realm was annihilated, but the martial arts still rushed out.

It's just that Wu Zhan was very embarrassed at this time, one arm was annihilated, and the origin artifact armor on his body was also shattered.

"Run!"

Wu Zhan knew that he was not Ye Tian's opponent, and he had no desire to fight at all, if he didn't run away, he would be dead.

Unfortunately, he had no hope of escaping from a space-time talent.

"Temporal Blade, go!"

Shout!

The Blade of Time and Space defied time and space, piercing through the body of the warrior.

In an instant, part of the vitality of Wu Zhan's body was wiped out, and his state declined again.

"Sky Moon Knife!"

Ye Tian slashed at the body of Wu Zhan.

After being hit by Wu Zhan, his body was almost split in half, but he still did not die.

"The vitality is really stubborn!"

Ye Tian sighed secretly.

He also knew very well that the reason why martial arts were so difficult to kill was because of the protection of the desolate realm, and if there was no protection of the desolate realm, martial warfare would have died a long time ago.

"The desolate demon is definitely far inferior to the innate gods in mobilizing the power of the desolate realm, it can be seen that after the innate gods mobilize the power of the desolate realm, the increase in combat power is even more terrifying, no wonder those supremes are very jealous of the supreme of the desolate realm, and they don't dare to enter the desolate realm at all!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Deep in the Void.

A group of innate divine consciousness is watching this battle.

At this moment, these innate gods were also completely dumbfounded.

Although Wu Zhan is not a very powerful cosmic god among the desolate demons, he is also a cosmic god!

The wasteland is not very big, and it is too much worse than the territory of the outside world, so there are not many cosmic gods in the desolate realm, and there are only dozens of cosmic gods among the desolate demons.

"You can't die in martial arts!"

An innate deity spoke.

"The death of a cosmic god by the desolate demon is a big deal, and if that person knew about it, he would definitely be furious. But we innate gods can't interfere, otherwise the power of the agreement oath will hit us hard, and even kill us!" said another innate deity.

"We can't make a move, we can only let those non-innate gods take action, let's see if there are any strong people nearby, and let him take action to rescue the martial arts!" said an innate god.

Hurriedly began to look for the nearby cosmic god powerhouse.

But the innate gods are not omnipotent, and it will take a little time for them to find the nearby cosmic god powerhouse, and there is no guarantee that they can find a suitable powerhouse.

"There is a Seventh Order of the Universe God here, but his strength is not as good as the Desolate Demon Martial Arts, maybe he can delay for a while, he is not the most suitable person!"

"The Universe God Peak Level Longteng is also relatively close to the battlefield, but I'm afraid it will take a few minutes to rush over, and that Universe God Seventh Order Upper Clan only needs about thirty seconds to rush over, what now?"

"Let that Seventh Order Master of the Cosmic God immediately go over and delay time, and then let Long Teng rush over to support, even if it is sacrificed to that Shang Clan, it is better than sacrificing the Desolate Demon!"

"Okay, that's it!"

The innate gods immediately mobilized and vowed to keep the war.
